title: The House Nobody Entered
content: For years, residents believed that no one lived in the large house at the end of the street. Curtains always remained closed, and the garden seemed untouched. One autumn afternoon, city workers visited to inspect the property. They discovered that the owner had moved abroad long ago but hired a local caretaker who quietly maintained the house every few weeks. The mystery survived only because the caretaker preferred working early in the morning when the streets were empty.
